task_objective: SRP decomposition of SDHLudusaviService and resolving review findings
design_decisions: Extracted types and constants into types.py and constants.py to avoid circular dependencies.
Moved watchdog, gateway, history, coordinator, and log buffer states to the sub-managers themselves to enforce SRP.
Added property proxies in SDHLudusaviService mapping sub-manager attributes to maintain facade backward compatibility with existing tests.
Extracted 9 game lifecycle methods into GameLifecycleManager in lifecycle.py and delegated service calls to it.
results: All 344 unit/integration tests passed successfully. Ruff check/format and ty type checks completed without errors.
